name: FlexLayout
description: Arrange items in one dimension with responsive direction and spacing control.

as.description: Renders the layout as a semantic HTML element instead of a div.

align.description: Controls cross-axis alignment of items in the current line.

direction.description: Defines the main axis and item order direction.

justify.description: Controls distribution of items along the main axis.

wrap.description: Allows items to wrap onto multiple lines.

separators.description: Adds separators between items when wrap is disabled (deprecated; prefer StackLayout separators).

margin.description: Sets outer spacing around the layout.

padding.description: Sets inner spacing within the layout.

slots.children: Layout children, commonly composed with `FlexItem` wrappers.

accessibility.role: varies by `as` element and layout context
aria: Use semantic HTML via `as` (for example `ol`/`li`) to provide structural meaning
Apply ARIA attributes based on rendered element semantics and surrounding pattern

inside: Responsive container sections that switch direction/wrap by breakpoint
